author: vvo
subject: v0.5.1
body: ## [0.5.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v0.5.0...v0.5.1) (2015-10-22) ### Bug Fixes * **autohide:** Rename attribute to `hideContainerWhenNoResults` ([ecb6756](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/ecb6756)), closes [#325](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/325) ### BREAKING CHANGES * autohide: Widget attribute is now named `hideContainerWhenNoResults` instead of `hideWhenNoResults` to be more explicit on what it is really doing. Also internally renamed the `autoHide` decorator to `autoHideContainer`
